name: policypool
description: PolicyPool Agent Coverage adds money-backed policy receipts for agent work.

scripts.typecheck: node --check api/*.js && node --check api/lib/*.js && node --check attesters/*.js && node --check sdk/*.js && node --check scripts/*.mjs && node --check scripts/lib/*.mjs && python3 -m py_compile scripts/policypool_fast_responder.py scripts/policypool_review_watch.py
scripts.agent:gate: npm run typecheck && npm run agent:verify && npm run agent:verify-preflight && npm run agent:verify-manifest && npm run agent:verify-payout-runner && npm run agent:verify-chain && npm run agent:verify-directory && npm run agent:verify-enrollment && npm run agent:verify-relay && npm run agent:verify-clocks && npm run agent:verify-evidence && npm run agent:verify-attester && npm run agent:verify-issuer && npm run agent:verify-universal-flow && npm run agent:verify-universal-manifest && npm run agent:verify-bond && npm run agent:verify-rate-limits && npm run agent:verify-relay-grants && npm run agent:verify-fee-escrow && npm run agent:verify-direct-state && npm run agent:verify-direct-settlement && npm run agent:verify-direct-a2mcp && npm run agent:verify-direct-handler && npm run agent:verify-v04-runtime-router && npm run agent:verify-direct-reconciler && npm run agent:verify-universal-reconciler && npm run agent:probe && npm run site:verify && npm run build
scripts.agent:gate-v04: npm run agent:gate && forge fmt --check && forge test --summary && npm run agent:verify-v04-release && npm audit --omit=dev
scripts.agent:gate-live: npm run agent:gate && npm run agent:verify-live
